title: MarlBurroW/kinbot
summary: Self-hosted AI agents with persistent memory, real identity, and collaboration. One process, one SQLite file, zero cloud.

title: repairman29/chump
summary: Self-hosted AI coding agent with persistent memory and bounded autonomy. Local-first, your keys, your data. Written in Rust.

title: knortzwellez/shellguard
summary: 🛡️ Enable secure, read-only SSH access for LLM agents to audit servers, run diagnostics, and inspect logs without risking data changes.

title: estrify/ProjectLodestar
summary: 🌟 Optimize AI development with Lodestar by smartly routing between free local and premium LLM models to cut costs by over 90%.

title: mikemichaelperry-cloud/Local-Lucy
summary: A self-learning, privacy-first desktop AI assistant with local LLM inference, voice interaction, and intelligent routing. Runs entirely on your machine.

title: Tpain166/claude-dashboard
summary: 🛠 Manage Claude Code sessions with a TUI featuring real-time monitoring, conversation history, and automatic session detection.

title: bhxtnx/SelfAgent
summary: 🤖 Build a self-hosted AI assistant to manage files, browse web, write code, and chat via a WhatsApp-style interface using your own API keys.

title: apocas/restai
summary: RESTai is an AIaaS (AI as a Service) open-source platform. Supports many public and local LLM suported by Ollama/vLLM/etc. Precise embeddings usage, tuning, analytics etc. Built-in image/audio generation with dynamic loading generators. Live chat deployment. Built-in block based graphical language. Prompt versioning and much more...

title: Glad-Labs/poindexter
summary: Poindexter — open-source AI content pipeline that researches, writes, reviews, and publishes autonomously. Self-hosted on your machine. Built by Glad Labs LLC.

title: LearningCircuit/local-deep-research
summary: ~95% on SimpleQA (e.g. Qwen3.6-27B on a 3090). Supports all local and cloud LLMs (llama.cpp, Ollama, Google, ...). 10+ search engines - arXiv, PubMed, your private documents. Everything Local & Encrypted.

title: blackroserog/Openclaw-Setup
summary: 🤖 Install and configure OpenClaw, a local AI assistant connecting to messaging apps for autonomous tasks and context-aware help.

title: guttbuster/Ollqd
summary: 📚 Index codebases and docs into Qdrant with Ollama embeddings, enabling AI assistants to search code via Model Context Protocol (MCP).

title: cionutc123456789-ops/nl-intent-routing-deterministic-ai-control-flow
summary: 🧭 Demonstrate deterministic AI control flow in C# combining intent routing, strict guardrails, and safe local LLM use for reliable decision making

title: 3ilix/MemBrain
summary: 🧠 Enhance AI interactions with MemBrain, a solution for long-term memory and context management in agentic AI systems, offering personalized experiences.

title: GBran88/AI-Assistant-Excel
summary: 🤖 Enhance your Excel experience with an AI assistant that automates tasks and integrates cloud and local models for smarter data management.

title: Shelpuk-AI-Technology-Consulting/kitty-bridge
summary: Universal LLM bridge for AI agents. Use Claude Code with MiniMax, Codex with GLM, or Gemini CLI with OpenRouter — one command, any provider. Works with coding agents, OpenClaw, Hermes, and others.

title: cozuXI/opencode_webui_cli
summary: 💻 Build and manage projects efficiently with the OpenCode Web UI CLI, featuring a chat interface, file previews, and model selection.
